context.goal: Insert a text annotation onto the current PDF slide using the Text properties dialog.
context.cues: TJAEditor document viewer is open on slide page 4/15 titled 'UNDERSTANDING MARKETING'. InsertText mode is active, and the Text properties dialog appears after clicking the page. The dialog contains a 'Text to insert' field and an Apply button.

state_anchor.locator: bottom status bar text 'InsertText mode : click on pdf to insert a text'

anchors.locator: target point on the visible PDF page where the text annotation should be inserted
Text properties dialog input field labeled 'Text to insert'

procedure.expect: Text properties dialog opens over the PDF page.
The typed text appears in the 'Text to insert' field with the caret after it.
Apply action is triggered; the cursor shows a busy indicator while the text insertion is being processed.
